name: MaxSizeDict

unions.name: MaxSizeDict
unions.comment: A dictionary with a maximum size.

values.name: get
values.comment:
Get the value associated with a key. If the key is not found, return
`Nothing`.
values.type: comparable -> MaxSizeDict comparable v -> Maybe v

values.name: insert
values.comment:
Insert a key-value pair into a dictionary. Replaces value when there is
a collision.
values.type: comparable -> v -> MaxSizeDict comparable v -> MaxSizeDict comparable v

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Determine if a dictionary is empty.

values.name: maxSize
values.comment: Determine the maximum number of key-value pairs in a dictionary.

values.name: member
values.comment: Determine if a key is in a dictionary.

values.name: remove
values.comment:
Remove a key-value pair from a dictionary. If the key is not found,
no changes are made.
values.type: comparable -> MaxSizeDict comparable v -> MaxSizeDict comparable v

values.name: singleton
values.type: Int -> comparable -> v -> MaxSizeDict comparable v

values.name: size
values.comment: Determine the number of key-value pairs in a dictionary.
